message:
feat(rchd): Add Unix socket API for hook-daemon communication

Implements bead v7u - Unix socket API:
- Create api.rs module with HTTP-like protocol over Unix socket
- Parse GET /select-worker?project=X&cores=N requests
- Integrate with worker selection algorithm
- Return JSON SelectionResponse

Hook client additions:
- Add daemon query function in hook.rs
- URL encoding/decoding for project names
- Graceful fallback when daemon unavailable

Also adds #[allow(dead_code)] to scaffold modules pending integration:
- workers.rs, config.rs, cache.rs

All 39 tests passing, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
